title: stelleropsis altaica subsp. tianschanica
intro: Stelleropsis altaica subsp. tianschanica, also known as Tianschan Stelleropsis or Tianshan Mountain Hair Grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Liliaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Stelleropsis altaica subsp. tianschanica is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
